steps.title: Identify the sides
steps.content: In a right triangle, $\sin\theta=\dfrac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}$. From the figure, the side opposite $y^\circ$ is 5 and the hypotenuse is 26.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: So $\sin y^\circ$ (or $\sin x^\circ$) $= \frac{5}{26}$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
